docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANDLER, GREGORY , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF GREGORY CHANDLER

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 59330296) FILED BY PLAINTIFF I INTERPRET, INC., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CHANDLER, GREGORY , INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA THE LAW OFFICES OF GREGORY CHANDLER

COURT TRIAL HELD. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR NON-SUIT ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT GRANTED. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF I INTERPRET AND AGAINST DEFENDANT GREGORY CHANDLER AS FOLLOWS: $980.00 PRINCIPAL; $192.40 INTEREST; $245.00 ATTY'S FEES; $200.00 COURT COSTS. TOTAL AMOUNT $1,617.40.
